name: applendium-extension
description: Tracks job application statuses directly from your inbox using React.

scripts.start: powershell -Command "if (-not $env:PARCEL_CACHE_DIR) { $env:PARCEL_CACHE_DIR = Join-Path $env:TEMP 'parcel-cache-applendium' }; $cache = $env:PARCEL_CACHE_DIR; parcel watch popup/public/index.html testing/public/index.html background.js --dist-dir popup/dist --public-url ./ --cache-dir $cache"
scripts.clean: powershell -Command "$dist = if ($env:DIST_DIR) { $env:DIST_DIR } else { 'popup/dist' }; if (Test-Path $dist) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $dist -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }"
scripts.build: powershell -Command "if (-not $env:PARCEL_CACHE_DIR) { $env:PARCEL_CACHE_DIR = Join-Path $env:TEMP 'parcel-cache-applendium' }; $cache = $env:PARCEL_CACHE_DIR; $dist = if ($env:DIST_DIR) { $env:DIST_DIR } else { 'popup/dist' }; if (Test-Path $dist) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $dist -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; $entries = @('popup/public/index.html', 'background.js'); if ($env:EXTENSION_BUILD_TARGET -ne 'production') { $entries = @('popup/public/index.html', 'testing/public/index.html', 'background.js') }; parcel build @entries --dist-dir $dist --no-source-maps --public-url ./ --cache-dir $cache; $mf = if ($env:MANIFEST_FILE) { $env:MANIFEST_FILE } else { 'manifest.json' }; Copy-Item $mf (Join-Path $dist 'manifest.json') -Force; if (Test-Path 'content.js') { Copy-Item 'content.js' (Join-Path $dist 'content.js') -Force }; if (Test-Path 'icons') { Copy-Item -Recurse icons $dist/ -Force }; $popupIndex = Join-Path $dist 'popup/public/index.html'; if (Test-Path $popupIndex) { (Get-Content $popupIndex) -replace 'href=public\.', 'href=../../public.' -replace 'src=public\.', 'src=../../public.' | Set-Content $popupIndex }; $testingIndex = Join-Path $dist 'testing/public/index.html'; if (Test-Path $testingIndex) { (Get-Content $testingIndex) -replace 'href=public\.', 'href=../../public.' -replace 'src=public\.', 'src=../../public.' | Set-Content $testingIndex }"
scripts.build:storelab: powershell -Command "$env:DIST_DIR = 'popup/dist_storelab'; Remove-Item Env:MANIFEST_FILE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:EXTENSION_BUILD_TARGET -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:EXTENSION_FORCE_BACKEND_TARGET -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:BACKEND_BASE_URL -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:PREMIUM_DASHBOARD_URL -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npm run build"
scripts.build:local: powershell -Command "Remove-Item Env:DIST_DIR -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:PARCEL_CACHE_DIR -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:MANIFEST_FILE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:EXTENSION_BUILD_TARGET -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $env:EXTENSION_FORCE_BACKEND_TARGET = 'local'; Remove-Item Env:BACKEND_BASE_URL_PROD -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:PREMIUM_DASHBOARD_URL_PROD -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:BACKEND_BASE_URL -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:PREMIUM_DASHBOARD_URL -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npm run build"
scripts.build:prod: powershell -Command "Remove-Item Env:DIST_DIR -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:PARCEL_CACHE_DIR -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $env:MANIFEST_FILE = 'manifest.prod.json'; $env:EXTENSION_BUILD_TARGET = 'production'; $env:EXTENSION_FORCE_BACKEND_TARGET = 'production'; $env:BACKEND_BASE_URL_PROD = if ($env:BACKEND_BASE_URL_PROD) { $env:BACKEND_BASE_URL_PROD } else { 'https://gmail-tracker-backend-674309673051.us-central1.run.app' }; $env:BACKEND_BASE_URL = $env:BACKEND_BASE_URL_PROD; $env:PREMIUM_DASHBOARD_URL_PROD = if ($env:PREMIUM_DASHBOARD_URL_PROD) { $env:PREMIUM_DASHBOARD_URL_PROD } else { 'https://applendium.com' }; $env:PREMIUM_DASHBOARD_URL = $env:PREMIUM_DASHBOARD_URL_PROD; npm run build"
scripts.package: npm run build && powershell -Command "$dist = if ($env:DIST_DIR) { $env:DIST_DIR } else { 'popup/dist' }; if (-not $env:EXT_VERSION) { $env:EXT_VERSION = 'dev' }; Compress-Archive -Path (Join-Path $dist '*') -DestinationPath applendium-extension-v$env:EXT_VERSION.zip -Force"
scripts.package:local: powershell -Command "Remove-Item Env:DIST_DIR -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:PARCEL_CACHE_DIR -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:MANIFEST_FILE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:EXTENSION_BUILD_TARGET -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $env:EXTENSION_FORCE_BACKEND_TARGET = 'local'; Remove-Item Env:BACKEND_BASE_URL_PROD -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:PREMIUM_DASHBOARD_URL_PROD -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:BACKEND_BASE_URL -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:PREMIUM_DASHBOARD_URL -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (-not $env:EXT_VERSION) { $env:EXT_VERSION = 'local' }; npm run package"
scripts.package:prod: powershell -Command "Remove-Item Env:DIST_DIR -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:PARCEL_CACHE_DIR -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $env:MANIFEST_FILE = 'manifest.prod.json'; $env:EXTENSION_BUILD_TARGET = 'production'; $env:EXTENSION_FORCE_BACKEND_TARGET = 'production'; $env:BACKEND_BASE_URL_PROD = if ($env:BACKEND_BASE_URL_PROD) { $env:BACKEND_BASE_URL_PROD } else { 'https://gmail-tracker-backend-674309673051.us-central1.run.app' }; $env:BACKEND_BASE_URL = $env:BACKEND_BASE_URL_PROD; $env:PREMIUM_DASHBOARD_URL_PROD = if ($env:PREMIUM_DASHBOARD_URL_PROD) { $env:PREMIUM_DASHBOARD_URL_PROD } else { 'https://applendium.com' }; $env:PREMIUM_DASHBOARD_URL = $env:PREMIUM_DASHBOARD_URL_PROD; if (-not $env:EXT_VERSION) { $manifest = Get-Content 'manifest.prod.json' | ConvertFrom-Json; $env:EXT_VERSION = $manifest.version }; npm run package"
scripts.release:prod: powershell -Command "Remove-Item Env:DIST_DIR -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:PARCEL_CACHE_DIR -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $env:MANIFEST_FILE = 'manifest.prod.json'; $env:EXTENSION_BUILD_TARGET = 'production'; $env:EXTENSION_FORCE_BACKEND_TARGET = 'production'; $env:BACKEND_BASE_URL_PROD = if ($env:BACKEND_BASE_URL_PROD) { $env:BACKEND_BASE_URL_PROD } else { 'https://gmail-tracker-backend-674309673051.us-central1.run.app' }; $env:BACKEND_BASE_URL = $env:BACKEND_BASE_URL_PROD; $env:PREMIUM_DASHBOARD_URL_PROD = if ($env:PREMIUM_DASHBOARD_URL_PROD) { $env:PREMIUM_DASHBOARD_URL_PROD } else { 'https://applendium.com' }; $env:PREMIUM_DASHBOARD_URL = $env:PREMIUM_DASHBOARD_URL_PROD; if (-not $env:EXT_VERSION) { $manifest = Get-Content 'manifest.prod.json' | ConvertFrom-Json; $env:EXT_VERSION = $manifest.version }; npm run build; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npm run verify:prod; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; Compress-Archive -Path (Join-Path 'popup/dist' '*') -DestinationPath applendium-extension-v$env:EXT_VERSION.zip -Force"
scripts.assets:store: powershell -Command "npm run build:storelab; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; node scripts/generate_chrome_store_assets.mjs"
scripts.test:e2e: powershell -Command "Remove-Item Env:MANIFEST_FILE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:EXTENSION_BUILD_TARGET -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:EXTENSION_FORCE_BACKEND_TARGET -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:BACKEND_BASE_URL_PROD -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:PREMIUM_DASHBOARD_URL_PROD -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:BACKEND_BASE_URL -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:PREMIUM_DASHBOARD_URL -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npm run build; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; playwright test"
scripts.test:e2e:headed: powershell -Command "Remove-Item Env:MANIFEST_FILE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:EXTENSION_BUILD_TARGET -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:EXTENSION_FORCE_BACKEND_TARGET -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:BACKEND_BASE_URL_PROD -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:PREMIUM_DASHBOARD_URL_PROD -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:BACKEND_BASE_URL -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:PREMIUM_DASHBOARD_URL -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npm run build; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; playwright test --headed"
